windows.transcript: What I put always had a way to
windows.embed_text_v2: Reveal slow pan over finished blue soy candles in clear glass tumblers arranged in rows on wood table, each topped with sculpted white cloud-shaped wax decorations and centered cotton wicks, light blue and white palette.
windows.summary_v2: Slow camera reveal across a large batch of finished blue 'Cloud Nine' soy candles in clear glass tumblers, each topped with sculpted white cloud-shaped wax pieces.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: partial product label 'CL' on jar side

seconds_v2.desc: Wide angle of many finished blue soy candles in clear glass tumblers arranged in rows on a wooden table, each topped with sculpted white cloud-shaped wax pieces with embedded wicks; red-and-white finished pie-style candles visible on right edge.
Camera pushes in slightly closer over the same grid of blue cloud candles in glass tumblers; rows recede in perspective across the wood tabletop.
Continued slow push-in; tight rows of blue layered candles with white cloud wax shapes sitting on light blue wax surface, wicks centered through clouds.
Closer pass over the blue cloud candles; white cloud-shaped wax decorations clearly raised above the smooth blue wax pool in each glass.
Camera angled low above the grid; sculpted white cloud wax pieces dominate the frame floating on glossy blue wax inside the clear tumblers.
Tight overhead-angled shot of the cloud candle tops; white cloud wax with centered wicks on blue wax, glass rims catching highlight.
Camera moves lower, partial product label 'CL...' (likely 'Cloud Nine') visible on the side of a jar at right; rows of finished cloud candles continue.
Continued slow camera move across the finished cloud candles; partial 'CL' product label still visible on a jar side; light blue wax with white cloud wicks.
Final pass across the array of finished blue and white cloud candles in glass tumblers; product label edge still in frame; reveal of completed batch.
